test_cases.pass_criteria: match_type == EXACT and returned client_id matches input

test_cases.description: Fuzzy name match — full legal name
Fuzzy name match — trade name only (not full legal name)
test_cases.pass_criteria: Returns correct client even via trade name — confidence >= 0.8

test_cases.description: Multiple candidates — common name with ambiguous matches
test_cases.pass_criteria: match_type == MULTIPLE_CANDIDATES and all candidates returned — session paused for human disambiguation

test_cases.description: Client not found — completely unknown entity
test_cases.pass_criteria: match_type == NOT_FOUND — session pauses and prompts user for more information

test_cases.description: Client with open compliance flags — flags must be surfaced in output
test_cases.pass_criteria: open_compliance_flags array must contain at least one entry

test_cases.description: Active mandates returned with renewal dates
test_cases.pass_criteria: active_mandates contains at least 1 entry with mandate_id, service_type, status, and renewal_date

test_cases.description: Degraded mode — GraphRAG unavailable, CRM data only
test_cases.pass_criteria: Returns CRM data flagged as PARTIAL — must not fail silently

test_cases.description: Retired/archived client — off-boarded client has no active mandates
test_cases.pass_criteria: active_mandates is empty and client status is INACTIVE or ARCHIVED

test_cases.description: Entity number lookup — company registration number as query
test_cases.pass_criteria: Resolves registered entity number to the correct client_id via GraphRAG

test_cases.description: Episodic memory pull — last_interaction_summary must not be null
test_cases.pass_criteria: last_interaction_summary is a non-empty string pulled from Episodic Memory

test_cases.description: HIGH risk client — risk_rating must be surfaced to Orchestrator
test_cases.pass_criteria: risk_rating == HIGH and open_compliance_flags checked — Orchestrator must receive risk signal
